title: ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH - 211info
text: HEALTH SERVICE BUILDING ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessment, individual, family, and group therapy, case management, skills training, peer specialist support, psychiatric services, and medication management. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with a severe and persistent mental illness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 766-6767 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6767 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Case/Care Management * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Medication Information/Management * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Mental Health Evaluation Peer Mental Health Support Services Psychiatric Medication Services Social Skills Training * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEALTH SERVICE BUILDING
